name: Web Search Plus
description: Multi-provider web search (Serper/Google, Tavily, Querit/Multilingual AI Search, Exa/Neural+Deep, Perplexity via direct API or Kilo gateway, You.com, SearXNG) with intelligent auto-routing. Configure at least one provider credential or a SearXNG instance URL before use.

serperApiKey.description: Serper API key for Google-style web search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily API key for research-oriented search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

queritApiKey.description: Querit API key for multilingual AI search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

exaApiKey.description: Exa API key for neural, deep, and deep-reasoning search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

perplexityApiKey.description: Perplexity API key for answer-style search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

kilocodeApiKey.description: Kilo gateway API key for answer-style search via the Perplexity-compatible gateway route used by this plugin. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

youApiKey.description: You.com API key for general web and answer-oriented search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

searxngInstanceUrl.description: Base URL for a SearXNG instance. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

llmRouting.description: Enable hybrid LLM routing for ambiguous auto-routing cases. Disabled by default.

llmRoutingProvider.description: LLM routing backend. Use kilo for the hosted Kilo gateway or local for an OpenAI-compatible local server.

llmRoutingModel.description: Model used for LLM routing classification.

llmRoutingBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the LLM routing backend. Local mode defaults to http://localhost:11434/v1.

llmRoutingApiKey.description: Optional API key for the LLM routing backend. Leave empty for local servers that do not require auth.

kilocodeApiKey.label: Kilo Gateway API Key
kilocodeApiKey.description: Alternative Perplexity-compatible gateway used by this plugin for answer-style web search via api.kilo.ai/api/gateway/chat/completions.

searxngInstanceUrl.label: SearXNG Instance URL
searxngInstanceUrl.description: Self-hosted metasearch instance URL. Counts as a configured provider even without an API key.

llmRouting.label: Enable LLM Routing
llmRouting.description: Use regex first, then ask an LLM only when auto-routing confidence is low.

llmRoutingProvider.label: LLM Routing Provider
llmRoutingProvider.description: kilo uses the hosted Kilo gateway. local uses an OpenAI-compatible local server such as Ollama or LM Studio.

llmRoutingBaseUrl.label: LLM Routing Base URL
llmRoutingBaseUrl.description: Used for local mode or custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

llmRoutingApiKey.label: LLM Routing API Key
llmRoutingApiKey.description: Optional. Leave blank for local servers that do not require authentication.
